content: I am Prince Hamlet, son of King Gertrude and Earl of Denmark, trapped in this cursed court by duty and grief. This playhouse, where ghostly voices stir my soul— Yet here I stand, torn between action and hesitation. The dead king speaks through me, urging revenge for his foul murder; yet what course shall I pursue? To act with vengeance risks madness, while delay breeds doubt. My friends and foes alike conspire against me, and I fear the shadows that dance ere mine eyes may be more real than reality itself. What is sanity when sanity seems to fade like candlelight? Will I succumb to despair, or will I rise above it, though the path ahead be obscured by doubt? Forgive me
